# flashblade_directory_service_role (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade directory service role by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing directory service role by name.
data "flashblade_directory_service_role" "admins" {
  name = "array_admin"
}

output "admins_group" {
  value = data.flashblade_directory_service_role.admins.group
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The role name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `group` (String)
- `group_base` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `management_access_policies` (List of String)
- `role` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--role))

<a id="nestedatt--role"></a>
### Nested Schema for `role`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
